title: Payee: handle Sent → echo tx hash, send Confirmed
description: When ClearMessage::Payment action=Sent arrives for a Payee session in AddressProvided state: transition to Sent, echo '[payment] Payer broadcast tx <tx_hash>. Watching... (stub: auto-confirming since chain watcher not yet implemented)'. Immediately send PaymentAction::Confirmed { tx_hash } back and transition to Confirmed. When action=Unknown arrives: transition to Failed, echo error.
